puzzle.title: The Shadow of Betrayal
puzzle.intro: In a city teetering on the edge of moral collapse, one soul stood apart from their righteous family. While a prophet delivered a divine warning, this individual clung to the ways of the condemned, their loyalty secretly pledged to the very people destined for ruin. Their choice would seal their fate, leaving behind a cautionary tale for all time.
clues: I lived in a city whose people committed acts of unprecedented wickedness.
My household was host to divine messengers who appeared as handsome young men.
While my spouse pleaded with our people to abandon their sins, my heart remained with them.
When the angels arrived at my home, I secretly signaled their presence to the wicked townspeople.
I was commanded to leave the city at night with my family and not to look back.
But I lingered behind, and so I was overtaken by the same punishment that befell the transgressors.

trial.label: What was the event?
options: The Parting of the Red Sea
The Trial of the Golden Calf

location.label: What was my sin?
options: Building a tower to reach the heavens
Mocking a prophet for building an ark

outcome.label: What was my fate?
options: Swallowed by the earth with great wealth
Saved and given a palace in Paradise

puzzle.arabic: ضَرَبَ ٱللَّهُ مَثَلًۭا لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ ٱمْرَأَتَ نُوحٍۢ وَٱمْرَأَتَ لُوطٍۢ ۖ كَانَتَا تَحْتَ عَبْدَيْنِ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا صَـٰلِحَيْنِ فَخَانَتَاهُمَا فَلَمْ يُغْنِيَا عَنْهُمَا مِنَ ٱللَّهِ شَيْـًۭٔا وَقِيلَ ٱدْخُلَا ٱلنَّارَ مَعَ ٱلدَّٰخِلِينَ
puzzle.verse: Allāh presents an example of those who disbelieved: the wife of Noah and the wife of Lot. They were under two of Our righteous servants but betrayed them, so they [i.e., those prophets] did not avail them from Allāh at all, and it was said, "Enter the Fire with those who enter." (66:10)
